# Anju Batta

> Senior Full Stack Developer & AI Automation Architect with 12+ years of experience, based in Chandigarh, India. Expert in AI Agent Development, n8n Automation, Shopify, Laravel, WordPress, and Mobile App Development. Available for new projects — response within 2 hours.

Anju Batta helps businesses build scalable digital systems while automating repetitive processes to drive real revenue. She bridges complex code (Laravel/Shopify) with modern automation (n8n/AI Agents), eliminating 20+ hours of manual work weekly for her clients. Best suited for Shopify stores, SaaS companies, and agencies ready to scale.

## Core Services

- [AI Agent Development](https://anjubatta.netlify.app/#ai-services-section): Builds autonomous AI agents using Claude, ChatGPT, and OpenAI APIs. Support bots with context awareness, data analysis agents, and research assistants. Rapid prototyping with Bolt, Lovable, and V0.
- [Business Automation – n8n & Zapier](https://anjubatta.netlify.app/#ai-services-section): Replaces fragile Zaps with robust n8n workflows. eCommerce: Shopify → Inventory → Shipping → Customer Email. CRM Sync, Lead Routing, Financial Reporting. Self-hosted n8n for enterprise-grade reliability.
- [Full Stack & Shopify Architecture](https://anjubatta.netlify.app/#ai-services-section): Custom Shopify 2.0 themes with automated inventory and Stripe/PayPal. Laravel/Node.js clean backend for SaaS apps. React, VueJS, Tailwind CSS frontends. REST APIs and GraphQL.
- [Mobile App Development](https://anjubatta.netlify.app/#about-section): iOS and Android apps using Ionic and Angular.
- [WordPress Development](https://anjubatta.netlify.app/#project-section): Custom themes, plugins, and WooCommerce integrations.

## Technology Stack

- AI & GenAI: Claude, ChatGPT, Claude Code, Bolt, Lovable, V0, OpenAI API
- Automation: n8n (self-hosted), Zapier, Make, Webhooks
- Backend: Laravel, PHP, Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, GraphQL
- Frontend: React, VueJS, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, HTML, CSS
- CMS: WordPress, Shopify, Ghost, Wix, BigCommerce, Kajabi, Framer
- Databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Airtable
- BI Tools: Power BI, Google Analytics, Tableau
- Mobile: Ionic, Angular

## Portfolio

- [All Projects (20+)](https://anjubatta.netlify.app/project_list.html): Web development, eCommerce, real estate, SaaS, and automation projects for clients in India, UK, USA, and Australia.

- 12+ years of professional development experience
- 500+ websites and applications delivered

- Junior/Mid PHP Developer at Cweb Consultants & 3 Beavers (2014–2017)
